Download link fixtures

Load this page with the extension installed and click each link. Expected behavior is noted next to each. The background downloads guard is the authoritative layer; the in-page modal is the first warning.

  • app.exe — high risk (executable), modal expected
  • installer.EXE — uppercase extension must still be detected
  • invoice.pdf.exe — deceptive double extension, high risk
  • archive.zip?token=abc&v=2 — query string must not hide the .zip extension
  • report.pdf (download attr) — medium risk document
  • photo.png — low risk, no modal expected
